title: Acoustics
description: Acoustics: The Acoustics object defines the noise criteria for an environments space, whether it's the prescribed ductwork velocity, the noise rating for the space or the dB level.

DuctVelocity.description: The prescribed velocity of the ductwork in the space (with more strict requirements for velocity in bedrooms and theatres (~3 m/s)

NoiseRating.description: The noise rating (NR), also known as noise criteria (NC) in the US, is the perceived loudness of a space

DecibelA.description: The Decibel A (dBA) is the sound pressure sensed by the human ear without sensitivity to very low and very high frequencies prescribed for a space

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
